inputs.titre: Condemnation of Bellicism by Martin of Tours

reason: The image depicts a man resembling Martin of Tours in a rural setting. He wears clothing consistent with the era (tunic and coarse linen drape). The environment consists of trees, fields, and a dirt path, fitting the time period. There are no visible modern objects or fantasy elements that would immediately invalidate the image. The earthen tones and lighting contribute to an appropriate atmosphere. The drape looks more medieval than roman. It could be improved by showing more details of the tunic underneath the drape. The hair also is modern.
